arts.ttl: Predicted Hull City line up for Watford as Ruben Selles eyes winning start to MKM Stadium reign
arts.sum: The Spaniard's first starting line-up will be an interesting one, given he will have watched every City game back on video, as well as seeing a couple of training sessions for himself. City's predicted starting XI: Pandur, Giles, McLoughlin, Hughes, Coyle (c), Alzate, Slater, Longman, Palmer, Kamara, Bedia.

arts.ttl: Inside Selles' first Hull City press call as new boss vows to shake things up
arts.sum: There was little fanfare, not even an introduction for Ruben Selles as he greeted the media for the first as Hull City boss within the tight confines of the MKM Stadium on Tuesday night. No grand statements, no ticker tape reception or flamboyant entrance, just a very business-like approach which will be music to the ears of his players, who want a manager who does his talking on the training ground so they can do theirs on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Referee named for Watford's trip to Hull
arts.sum: Leigh Doughty is due to referee Watford's trip to Hull City in the Championship tonight.

arts.ttl: Simons out: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face Watford
arts.sum: Hull City are back in Championship action on Wednesday night with a home clash against Watford. Hull City… The post Simons out: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face Watford appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hull City promotion-winning hero shares biggest fear after Ruben Selles appointment
arts.sum: It's a great football club, and the manager's got a tough job on at the minute and hopefully, they can turn it around." "You've got to start winning football matches very, very quickly, and the new manager's got a great job on his hands.

arts.ttl: ‘Very good for us’ – Hull City owner shares January transfer update
arts.sum: Hull City chairman Acun Ilicali has said they are ‘working’ on recruitment plans for January. Hull City are… The post ‘Very good for us’ – Hull City owner shares January transfer update appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hull City confirm major new appointment ahead of crucial January transfer window
arts.sum: Dublin, who joined City in the summer after leaving Championship rivals Stoke City in May, has taken on the new role in recent weeks and played a key role in bringing Ruben Selles to the MKM Stadium, having worked previously with the Spaniard at Reading. "This is a new chapter for us as a club bringing Ruben in and the team that comes around him," Dublin said.

arts.ttl: Six key Hull City tasks facing Ruben Selles in his first 100 days at the MKM Stadium
arts.sum: Former boss Liam Rosenior had a natural relationship with City's fans because he was a player at the club during its most successful period earlier this century, so that helped when he returned as manager. While the young players are talented but need support and confidence, there are some very good more senior pros at City, like Lewie Coyle, Alfie Jones, Regan Slater, Ryan Giles, Cody Drameh and Joao Pedro.

arts.ttl: Acun Ilicali makes Hull City January transfer guarantee after Ruben Selles statement
arts.sum: Ilicali was speaking alongside new City boss Ruben Selles as the Tigers manager was unveiled to the press at the MKM Stadium. The new City boss has already told sporting director Jared Dublin and the board that he would prefer a smaller squad to work with and with that in mind it is quality rather than quality which the club are aiming for when the window opens in 21 days.

arts.ttl: Watford boss delivers Ruben Selles verdict as Hull City prepare for new era
arts.sum: Cleverley's Hornets have had the benefit of an extra few days preparation after their game at Cardiff City on Saturday fell victim to Storm Darragh, and he's expecting a reaction from the Tigers under a manager he faced in pre-season. Watford head coach Tom Cleverley admits Ruben Selles is a manager who has impressed him as the Hornet's head coach prepares to take on Hull City on Wednesday night.
